### Notes on At-Risk Items

- **#11 — Tier-2/Tier-3 sponsor close:** Currently at $135K of $250K target. Pipeline has $80K in late-stage conversations but two prospects have gone quiet. Sponsorship Lead escalating with direct outreach this week.
- **#13 — Sponsor payments received:** Two Tier-1 sponsors have not yet remitted first installment despite signed agreements. Finance following up; may need General Chair intervention if not resolved by Aug 1.
